title: sesleria varia var. albicans
intro: Sesleria varia var. albicans is a plant species also known as white mountain fescue, it is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and it is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sesleria varia var. albicans include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including as a powder or a tincture.
